title: Optimizing Docker Images Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on reducing Docker image size and build times.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Optimizing Docker Images'?
options: Building smaller, faster, and more efficient container images for your application project

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in an image-optimization workflow for a project?
options: Using multi-stage builds to only include your production-ready code in your application's final images
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
